MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE NOTICE OF CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to set aside notice of conditional settlement is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
